# Matteo Ferigo

Personal website and portfolio of Matteo Ferigo.

## About

Software Engineer specializing in web technologies, frontend development, TypeScript, React, and software architecture.

## Primary content

- Personal profile
- Projects
- Technical skills
- Professional experience
- Contact information
